title: Outcome Memories - Cream Moveset
description: Adds the moveset of Cream from Outcome Memories on Roblox.
body:
This mod adds two of OM Cream's abilities:



- Heal: Will heal players and entities around you 5 health every second.
- Dash: Boosts the player forward but, running into an entity will bounce the entity back and give you a short speed boost.

Healing a entity will give you 5 exp and healing a player will give you 10 exp.



This is mainly cause I wanted to see if I can add OM abilities to Minecraft. Enjoy!



The keybinds by default are:

G - Heal

V - Dash

Keybinds are configurable.
